consequence: you could knock over a tombstone
if you run in to one you may break it
explanation: it is not nice to run in a graveyard
there are headstones in your way

consequence: people will get upset at you
you would be called disrespectful and told to move on
explanation: it is rude to sit on the ground of a graveyard
the grassy ground is for the peaceful repose of the deceased and their visitors
